riskTab.mergeSubtitle: The current clause will be replaced by the proposed version. The original is kept in version history.
riskTab.clauseUpdated: Clause updated with the re-phrased version.
riskTab.confirmSaveBody: Your edit replaces the current recommendation text.
riskTab.confirmProposalTitle: Save changes to the proposed clause?
riskTab.confirmProposalBody: Your edit becomes the version that will be merged.
riskTab.markHandled: Mark this risk as handled after merge
riskTab.showInTopHint: Promote into the visible top 2 (replaces the lower-severity one)

relationshipType.fieldHint: How this contract sits in the delivery chain or legal relationship.
relationshipType.createError: Couldn't create the contract. Please check the details and try again.

desc.MAIN: The head agreement between the employer and the main contractor.
desc.SUBCONTRACT: A contractor's agreement with a subcontractor under a main contract.
desc.NOMINATED_SUB: A subcontractor named by the employer, engaged under the main contract.
desc.NOMINATED_SUPPLIER: A supplier named by the employer, engaged under the main contract.
desc.SUPPLY_DIRECT: A direct supply or purchase of goods and materials.
desc.CONSULTANT: Appointment of a consultant or engineer for professional services.
desc.USUFRUCT: A right to use and benefit from a property owned by another.
desc.JOINT_VENTURE: Two or more parties combining for a shared project.
desc.FRAMEWORK: An umbrella agreement for repeated call-off contracts.
desc.NOVATION: Transfer of a contract's rights and obligations to a new party.

parent.label: Parent contract
parent.hintRequired: This relationship type must be linked to a parent contract.
parent.hintOptional: Optionally link this contract to a parent.
parent.noneAvailable: No eligible parent contracts in this project yet.

partiesEditor.title: Edit contract parties
partiesEditor.subtitle: Manage the organisations bound by this contract, and the people who sign on their behalf.
partiesEditor.signatoriesHint: Signatories sign on behalf of their organisation.
partiesEditor.frozen: This contract is signed — its parties are frozen and can no longer be edited.
partiesEditor.saveError: Couldn't save the parties. Please try again.

empty.title: No parties yet
empty.hint: Add them manually, or upload a contract document to auto-extract.

fields.orgNamePlaceholder: e.g. Al Murooj Real Estate Development
fields.signsHint: Turn on if this party signs the contract.
fields.ownOrgHint: Link this party to your SIGN organisation.

contacts.title: Authorised contacts
contacts.hint: The people authorised to act for this party. The designated signatory receives the invitation.
contacts.name: Full name

errors.multipleDesignated: Only one designated signatory is allowed per party.

contractCreate.chooseForm: Choose a standard form or create a custom contract
contractCreate.prePopulatedNote: Clauses will be pre-populated from the standard form template
contractCreate.standardFormTooltip: Standard forms provide the internationally recognized clause structure. Customize using Particular Conditions without modifying the General Conditions.

hostReview.onlyDiffsShown: only the differences are shown by default
hostReview.errorLoad: Couldn't load the proposed version. Please try again.
hostReview.noChangesBody: The guest's version matches the current contract — there is nothing to accept or reject.
hostReview.newClauseNoOriginal: New clause — no original to compare
hostReview.mergeHelper: Edit the wording directly. Saving sets your own final text — the clause is marked Edited, neither the original nor the guest's version.
hostReview.shortcuts: Shortcuts: A accept · R reject · M merge · ← / → navigate
hostReview.unchangedIdentical: This clause is identical to the current contract — nothing to review.
hostReview.completeReviewSubtitle: You reviewed all {{total}} proposed changes. Apply them to update the contract, or go back to adjust.
hostReview.completeRejectedSubtitle: You rejected all proposed changes. The guest will be notified to revise and re-submit.
hostReview.completeAppliedSubtitle: The proposed version is now the active contract. The previous version is preserved in history.
hostReview.completeKeptSubtitle: No changes were applied. The contract is unchanged.
hostReview.snapshotNote: A snapshot of your current contract is saved to Version History before changes apply. Rejected clauses keep their current wording.
hostReview.appliedNote: {{count}} clauses updated · saved to Version History
hostReview.applyDialogSubtitle: Final step · the proposed version becomes the live contract
hostReview.whatThisDoes: What this does to the contract
hostReview.snapshotReassuranceTitle: Your current contract is saved to Version History first.
hostReview.snapshotReassuranceBody: You can restore it at any time — so applying is recoverable, not permanent loss.
hostReview.applyFailed: Couldn't apply the changes. Please try again.
hostReview.bannerEdited: Edited — this clause will use your final wording.
hostReview.bannerAcceptedModify: Accepted — the proposed wording will replace the current clause.
hostReview.bannerAcceptedAdd: Accepted — this new clause will be added to the contract.
hostReview.bannerAcceptedRemove: Accepted — this clause will be removed from the contract.
hostReview.bannerRejectedModify: Rejected — the current wording is kept, the proposal is discarded.
hostReview.bannerRejectedAdd: Rejected — the proposed clause is discarded.
hostReview.bannerRejectedRemove: Rejected — the clause stays in the contract.
hostReview.helperModify: Accepting replaces the current clause with the proposed wording. Nothing is final until you apply.
hostReview.helperAdd: Accepting adds this new clause to the contract. Nothing is final until you apply.
hostReview.helperRemove: Accepting removes this clause from the contract. Nothing is final until you apply.

directory.empty: No parties or team members yet

guests.title: Portal Guests
guests.explanation: Guest access is contract-scoped today, so a project-wide guest list isn't available yet. Guests invited to this project's contracts will appear here once project-level guest visibility ships.

proposedVersions.reviewOnlyNote: Review only — accept, reject, and merge are coming soon.

contract.title: Contract
contract.noClauses: No clauses yet. Add clauses from the library.
contract.versionHistory: Version history will be loaded here. Current version: {{version}}
contract.noClausesAvailable: No clauses available. Create clauses in the Clause Library first.

markSigned.confirmBody: This records the contract as signed and permanently locks it. Its content can no longer be edited. Only do this if you're holding a fully signed copy of the contract.

errors.alreadyLocked: This contract is already signed and locked.
errors.notReady: This contract isn't in a state that can be marked as signed yet.
errors.noPermission: You don't have permission to mark this contract as signed.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete Obligation

ui.emptySubtext: Obligations will appear here after AI extraction or manual entry.
ui.allSubtitle: Track obligations across all your contracts and projects

add.title: Add Obligation
add.subtitle: Create a new obligation for this contract

markActioned.title: Mark Obligation as Actioned
markActioned.evidenceMessage: Protect yourself. Upload evidence of compliance — in construction disputes, an undocumented obligation is the same as an unmet one. A timestamped record is your most reliable defence.
markActioned.fileUploadDeferred: Direct file upload is coming in a future step. For now, paste a link to your hosted evidence file.
markActioned.waivedReasonRequired: Please provide a reason when waiving an obligation

detail.reminderHistoryDeferred: Reminder history will appear here once the audit endpoint ships in a future step.

form.isCriticalHint: Critical obligations always send reminders, even if the recipient has opted out of email digests.

errors.dueDateInPast: Due date must be today or later
errors.amountRequired: Amount is required when a currency is provided
errors.currencyRequired: Currency is required when an amount is provided

modal.title: Export portfolio as PDF
modal.recipient: Your portfolio snapshot will be emailed to {{email}}.
modal.expiry: The download link expires in 1 hour.
modal.recovery: Single email delivery, no in-app notification. If the email does not arrive, you can re-export from this page — it is free and idempotent.

toast.success: Your export is being generated and will be emailed to {{email}}.

error.generic: Could not request export. Please try again.
error.rateLimit: Too many export requests. Please wait a few minutes before trying again.

processing.reuploadTip: Remove this document and upload a higher-quality scan for best results.

qualityWarning.blur: Blurry scan detected (sharpness score: {{score}}). Text may be misread.
qualityWarning.contrast: Low contrast detected (contrast score: {{score}}). Text may be faint or washed out.
qualityWarning.rotation: Page skew detected ({{degrees}}°). Clauses may be extracted in the wrong order.

sharing.successInternal: Access granted to {{name}} — they've been notified.

erp.title: ERP Connections
erp.subtitle: Connect your ERP to import actual cost data for claims and variation analysis.
erp.featureOff: ERP integration is not enabled for your organization yet. Contact your administrator to turn it on.
erp.confirmDelete: Delete the connection "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

empty.title: No ERP connections yet
empty.subtitle: Add a connection to start importing cost data from your ERP.

form.name: Connection name
form.skeletonWarning: This connector is not yet operational — it's a prerequisite-gated placeholder and syncs will fail until it's enabled.
form.credentialsHint: Credentials are stored encrypted and are never shown again after saving.

mappings.title: Field mappings
mappings.help: Map each ERP field to a SIGN field. Imported cost rows are built from these mappings.
mappings.missingRequired: Required fields not yet mapped: {{fields}}. Imports won't produce rows until they are.
mappings.empty: No mappings yet. Add a row to map an ERP field to a SIGN field.

sync.title: Sync & history
sync.help: Run an import now and review past sync runs.
sync.alreadyQueued: A sync is already in progress.
sync.disabledNotice: This connection is disabled — enable it to run a sync.

admin.title: ERP Health
admin.subtitle: Cross-tenant monitoring of every organization's ERP connections.
admin.featureOff: ERP integration is not enabled on this environment.
admin.empty: No ERP connections across any organization yet.

delete.title: Delete ERP connection
delete.requiresHold: Suspend the connection before it can be deleted.

modal.reasonPlaceholder: Why are you taking this action? (recorded in the audit log)
modal.deleteWarning: This permanently removes the connection and its imported data. The customer is notified and must set it up again to resume syncing.
modal.deleteConfirmCheckbox: I understand this permanently removes the connection.

uploadStatus.processingHint: We're extracting the clauses from the version you uploaded.
uploadStatus.submittedHint: Your uploaded version was sent to the contract owner to review — they'll see your proposed clauses. It does not replace the contract you're viewing.
uploadStatus.failedHint: Something went wrong while processing your version. Please try uploading it again.
uploadStatus.reviewHint: We couldn't reliably read this scan. Please upload a clearer copy.

contractView.noClauses: This contract has no extracted clauses yet.
contractView.downloadError: Couldn't download the PDF. Please try again.

upload.success: New version uploaded — it's being processed.
upload.error: Couldn't upload the file. Please try again.
upload.errorType: Only PDF or Word documents are accepted.
upload.errorDailyLimit: Daily upload limit reached. Please try again tomorrow.
upload.errorRateLimited: Too many uploads right now. Please wait a moment and try again.

commentCta.title: Want to comment on this contract?
commentCta.body: Set a password to leave attributed comments, upload versions, and ask the AI assistant about this contract. Your access stays limited to this contract.

identity.title: Set a password to comment
identity.subtitle: You'll get a guest identity limited to this contract.
identity.subtitleEmail: You'll get a guest identity for {{email}}, limited to this contract.
identity.passwordHint: At least 12 characters, with an uppercase letter, a number, and a special character.
identity.success: You can now comment on this contract.

errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 12 characters and include an uppercase letter, a number, and a special character.
errors.invalid: This invitation is no longer valid. Ask the sender for a fresh link.
errors.conflict: An account already exists for this invitation, and the password did not match. Use the original password, or contact the sender.
errors.existingAccount: This email is already registered with a SIGN account. Accessing shared contracts with an existing account isn't available yet — please contact whoever shared this contract with you.
errors.throttled: Too many attempts. Please wait a minute and try again.
errors.generic: Could not set your password just now. Please try again.

blocked.title: This invitation cannot be used to set up access
blocked.body: It can no longer be used to set up commenting access — it may already have been used, or it may have expired. If you already set up access, reopen your original invitation link; otherwise, contact the person who invited you.

comments.heading: Comments
comments.placeholder: Add a comment on this contract…
comments.empty: No comments yet. Be the first to comment.

errors.sessionExpired: Your guest session expired. Reload the page to comment again.
errors.throttled: Too many comments in a short time. Please wait a moment.
errors.generic: Could not post your comment. Please try again.

noToken.title: Missing invitation link
noToken.body: This page needs a valid invitation link. Please open the link from your invitation email.

invalid.title: This invitation link is invalid or has expired
invalid.body: The link may have been mistyped, already used up, or revoked. Ask the sender for a fresh invitation.

expired.title: Your viewing session expired
expired.body: For security, guest viewing sessions are short-lived. Reload to start a new session from the same link.

notFound.title: This invitation link is invalid or has expired
notFound.body: The link may have been mistyped, already used up, or revoked. Ask the sender for a fresh invitation.

throttled.title: Too many attempts
throttled.body: You have opened this link a few times in quick succession. Please wait a minute and try again.

unknown.title: Something went wrong
unknown.body: We could not load this shared contract just now. Please try again in a moment.

assistant.title: SIGN AI Assistant
assistant.welcomeTitle: How can I help with this contract?
assistant.welcomeBody: Ask me anything about the clauses, payment terms, dates or obligations — I'll point you to the exact clause.
assistant.suggested4: Who are the parties to this contract?
assistant.placeholderCapped: Daily limit reached — try again tomorrow
assistant.helper: SIGN AI can make mistakes. Verify important details in the contract.
assistant.errorText: Something went wrong reaching the assistant.
assistant.stillWorking: Still working on your answer — refresh to check.
assistant.rateBody: You've used all {{limit}} questions for today. Your limit resets tomorrow — you can still read the conversation above.
assistant.throttleNotice: You're sending messages too quickly. Please wait a moment.
assistant.sessionExpired: Your secure session expired. Reload the page to keep chatting.
